notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the libguestfs SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 6 CVEs: CVE-2021-3507, CVE-2022-0897, CVE-2022-2211, CVE-2022-23645, CVE-2022-4144, and 1 more.
notes.title: Description
